_meta.description: Data provenance map for semiconductor-dashboard.html. Each entry records the source, URL, and retrieval date for key numeric fields. Update this file whenever segment data is refreshed.
_meta.reviewer: Manual — cross-checked against SIA, SEMI, and company earnings

global_tam.source: SIA Factbook 2025 / WSTS Bi-Annual Semiconductor Market Forecast
global_tam.note: 2025 figure (~$795B) is a preliminary estimate based on WSTS spring 2025 forecast. Confirm against WSTS June 2025 update.

wfe_spending.source: SEMI World Fab Forecast — Spring 2025 Edition
wfe_spending.note: 2025 WFE actuals ($113B) based on SEMI spring 2025 preliminary data. 2026+ are SEMI consensus forecasts.

tam_usd_bn.source: Gartner EDA Market Forecast Q1 2025 + Synopsys/Cadence FY2024 combined revenue extrapolation

cagr_pct.source: Gartner 5-yr CAGR estimate for EDA/IP segment

china_share_pct.source: CSIA 2024 Annual Report estimate; BIS export control impact analysis

ai_lift.note: AI-driven uplift estimated from Synopsys DSO.ai and Cadence Cerebrus adoption rates in design centers; McKinsey AI Semiconductor 2025 report

tam_usd_bn.source: ARM Holdings FY2025 guidance + Gartner IP licensing market

cagr_pct.source: ARM royalty growth trajectory from IPO prospectus + FY2024 results

china_share_pct.source: ARM China JV revenue estimate; RISC-V China adoption data from RISC-V International

ai_lift.note: AI NPU IP block adoption rate from ARM Compute Library data; CEVA AI IP licensing growth

tam_usd_bn.source: IC Insights / Omdia Fabless Top-50 ranking 2025; NVDA FY2025 + AMD CY2025 guidance

cagr_pct.source: Omdia fabless 5-yr CAGR, AI accelerator segment growth weighted

china_share_pct.source: CSIA + IC Insights China fabless revenue share; reduced from 16% due to HiSilicon volume constraints

ai_lift.note: NVDA data center GPU revenue as AI proxy ($115B+ in FY2025); AMD Instinct guidance; Broadcom custom ASIC disclosure

tam_usd_bn.source: SEMI Silicon Manufacturers Group (SMG) Q4 2024 shipment data + price trend

cagr_pct.source: Shin-Etsu / SUMCO investor day guidance; SEMI SMG long-range forecast

china_share_pct.source: Zhonghuan / SIMGUI capacity data; SEMI China fab wafer consumption estimate

ai_lift.note: AI server wafer intensity higher than consumer; estimated from TSMC CoWoS-L wafer consumption vs. standard compute

tam_usd_bn.source: SEMI Photomask Market Report 2025; Photronics FY2024 10-K

cagr_pct.source: EUV mask ASP increase + tape-out volume growth; Photronics guidance

china_share_pct.source: Photronics China revenue disclosure; estimated domestic mask shop revenue

ai_lift.note: High-NA EUV mask demand correlated with TSMC N2 AI chip tape-outs; limited public data

tam_usd_bn.source: SEMI World Fab Forecast Spring 2025; ASML/AMAT/LRCX/KLAC combined guidance

cagr_pct.source: SEMI 5-yr WFE CAGR forecast; VLSI Research equipment outlook

china_share_pct.source: SEMI China equipment spending estimate; down from 28% as stockpiling peaked in 2023-24

ai_lift.note: AI fab capex from TSMC CoWoS capacity expansion + HBM DRAM equipment; AMAT/LRCX AI-specific revenue disclosures

tam_usd_bn.source: TECHCET Critical Materials Council 2025; DuPont / Entegris / Shin-Etsu combined semiconductor chemical revenue

cagr_pct.source: TECHCET 5-yr CAGR for semiconductor materials; EUV resist volume growth weighted

china_share_pct.source: CSIA materials import/export data; domestic photoresist production estimates

ai_lift.note: EUV resist and high-purity gas demand correlated with leading-edge AI chip fab activity; indirect estimate

tam_usd_bn.source: TrendForce Foundry Revenue Ranking Q4 2024; TSMC 2025 annual revenue guidance ($105-110B TWD equivalent)

cagr_pct.source: TrendForce 5-yr foundry CAGR; TSMC long-term model (15-20% revenue CAGR)

china_share_pct.source: SMIC + Hua Hong revenue as % of total; TrendForce China foundry share quarterly

ai_lift.note: TSMC AI revenue disclosure: AI accounted for ~mid-teens % of wafer revenue in 2024, growing to ~20%+ in 2025

tam_usd_bn.source: TrendForce OSAT Revenue Ranking 2025; ASE / Amkor FY2024 revenue + CoWoS captive estimate

cagr_pct.source: Advanced packaging (CoWoS, SoIC, HBM) volume growth; TrendForce advanced packaging forecast

china_share_pct.source: JCET + Huatian + Tongfu revenue; TrendForce China OSAT share; slightly down from 29% as AI packaging non-China

ai_lift.note: TSMC CoWoS capacity tripling 2024→2026 driven by NVDA H100/H200/B200; HBM bonding for AI memory; direct AI packaging demand measurable

idm._status: DEPRECATED 2026-05-09 — replaced by 'downstream' parent + 5 sub-segments. Old IDM tracked supply-side IDMs (Samsung/Intel/TI); new Downstream tracks demand-side end-markets.

tam_usd_bn.source: IC Insights IDM Top-20 ranking 2025; Samsung / Intel / TI / ST combined revenue estimates

cagr_pct.source: IC Insights IDM 5-yr CAGR; memory recovery offset by PC/mobile softness

china_share_pct.source: YMTC / CXMT / BYD Semi revenue estimate; CSIA IDM segment data

ai_lift.note: Samsung HBM3/HBM3E revenue for AI; SK Hynix HBM dominance; Intel Gaudi AI accelerator ramp — measurable AI subset

memory._note: Aggregated parent — see mem_hbm/mem_dram/mem_nand/mem_hdd children for primary sources. Aggregate values are sums (TAM, China TAM) or TAM-weighted averages (CAGR, AI lift uplift).

tam_usd_bn.source: Sum of HBM ($22B) + DRAM ($110B) + NAND ($82B) + HDD ($14B). Underlying sources: SEMI, WSTS, TrendForce, IDC, vendor 10-Ks.

cagr_pct.source: TAM-weighted average of children CAGRs (HBM 45 / DRAM 15 / NAND 12 / HDD 3).

downstream._note: Aggregated parent over 5 end-market children. Top-level parent figures are sums/weighted-averages; see children for primary sources.

tam_usd_bn.source: Sum across AI DC ($230B) + Non-AI DC ($90B) + PC ($85B) + Smartphone ($130B) + Auto/Industrial ($160B).

AI PC market alone $32.2B (Persistence Market Research); broader PC semi (CPU+iGPU+dGPU+DRAM+NAND+I/O+Wi-Fi+PMIC) ~$80-95B for 250M units shipped; Intel PC CPU rev ~$22B + AMD PC CPU ~$8B + NVDA mobile dGPU ~$4.5B + Apple M-series ~$12B + memory content + misc. Cross-checked vs. Statista 'AI laptop $32.2B 2025' and Gartner 'AI PCs ~31% of PC market by end-2025'.

cagr_pct.source: Copilot+ refresh cycle (40 TOPS NPU floor) drives upgrade demand; ABI Research projects ARM PC share 5% → 13% by 2030; AI PC share 31% (2025) → 60%+ (2030) per Gartner.

china_share_pct.source: Lenovo (China HQ) ~25% global PC unit share + China consumer/enterprise/government tenders; 'Xinchuang' (信创) domestic CPU procurement carving small share.

tam_usd_bn.source: Smartphone semi: AP-SoC $42B (Statista/Mordor) + RFFE ~$25B + CIS ~$20B (Sony 50% share) + memory content ~$30B + PMIC/audio/sensors ~$13B = ~$130B. Statista narrow estimate $146B for 2025 (rising from $104B in 2023); Fortune Business Insights $40.88B is AP-only narrow definition.

cagr_pct.source: Smartphone unit shipments flat ~1.2B/yr; ASP up via 5G + memory content + on-device AI premium; Counterpoint AP-SoC growth 5.29% (Mordor); broader semi content slightly less.

china_share_pct.source: Xiaomi + OPPO + Vivo + Honor + Huawei collectively >40% global smartphone unit share; semi consumption skewed by Apple/Samsung/Sony non-China sourcing.

tam_usd_bn.source: Auto semi: Yole 2025 'Infineon/NXP/STM in $132B race' to $137B by 2030; MarketsandMarkets $133B by 2030; consensus $77-100B in 2025. Industrial chip: TI/ADI/Microchip combined industrial rev ~$35B + Infineon/NXP/Renesas industrial ~$20B + Bosch/Siemens captive + sensors/PLC + grid/energy = ~$60-80B. Combined ~$160B.

cagr_pct.source: Yole/MarketsandMarkets auto semi 8-9% CAGR to 2030; EV semi content 2× ICE; ADAS/SDV driving SoC growth; industrial mid-single-digit.

china_share_pct.source: China = world's largest auto market (~30%) and EV market (60%+ of global EV production); BYD Semiconductor + Inovance + Sanan + Horizon Robotics growing domestic share; western tier-1s (Infineon/NXP/ST) major China revenue.

tam_usd_bn.source: Big-4 CSP FY26 capex guidance ~$380B (MSFT ~$120B, AMZN ~$125B, GOOG ~$90B, META ~$70B); semiconductor content share applied; merged from former ds_ai_dc ($230B) + CSP share of ds_non_ai_dc ($90B).

ds_csp.note: Restructured 2026-07-04: AI DC + Non-AI DC replaced by buyer-type split (CSP vs New Cloud). Prior sourcing preserved below.

tam_usd_bn.source: IDC: data-center semis $209B in 2024 → $477B in 2026 (AI driving growth); Yole Group 2030 GPU forecast $215B; NVDA AI-related FY26 ~$130B + AMD MI ~$9B + Broadcom AI ASIC ~$28B + TSMC AI wafer rev ~$35B + HBM ~$22B + Marvell ~$4.5B; AI subset of DC silicon estimated $185-250B in 2025.

cagr_pct.source: IDC: data-center semis 2024 $209B → 2026 $477B implies ~50% near-term CAGR; Yole GPU forecast 2024 $100B → 2030 $215B = 14% CAGR; AI subset growing faster — 35% midpoint to 2030.

china_share_pct.source: China AI accelerator market constrained by US export controls (NVDA H20 ban Apr 2025); Huawei Ascend domestic build-out estimated at 30-50% of China demand in 2025; cross-checked vs. SemiAnalysis China AI capex tracker.

ai_lift.note: Definitionally ~96% AI — segment is purpose-built for AI workloads; remaining 4% is general-purpose accelerator workloads (HPC, graphics, video).

tam_usd_bn.source: Server CPU $22.86B (Intel + AMD); server DRAM ~$16B; eSSD ~$12B; networking ~$14B; misc (NIC/DPU/BMC/security) ~$25B. Cross-checked vs. Mordor + Skyquest enterprise server reports ($116B total system rev implies semi content ~$90B).

cagr_pct.source: Mordor: server CPU growing low-single-digit; AI shift cannibalizes capex from non-AI DC; CXL/DPU/storage upgrades sustain mid-single-digit growth.

china_share_pct.source: Alibaba/Tencent/ByteDance + China Telecom/Mobile cloud + government cloud share; estimated from CSIA + Yole datacenter regional analysis.

tam_usd_bn.source: CoreWeave FY25 revenue ~$5B + backlog >$55B (OpenAI ~$22B); Nebius ARR guide + Microsoft $17.4-19.4B deal; Oracle OCI AI infra revenue; xAI/Lambda/Crusoe private estimates. GPU purchase flow-through, not rental revenue.

ds_neocloud.players_source: CoreWeave S-1 + 10-Q (2025), Nebius investor letters, Oracle FY26 earnings (Stargate/OpenAI $300B RPO disclosure), press for xAI Colossus.

tam_usd_bn.source: WSTS analog ~$85B + power discrete/module ~$50B (Omdia/Yole power semi trackers).

children.analog: Company FY25 revenue: TI ~$16.6B (10-K), ADI ~$10.4B (FY25 10-K), Skyworks/Qorvo merger announcement 2025, Microchip FY25.
children.power: Infineon FY25 annual report (power ~€6.5B), onsemi 10-K, ST SiC disclosures (Catania), Rohm/Mitsubishi/Fuji IR; Wolfspeed Ch.11 emergence 2025; Navitas-NVIDIA 800V HVDC press May-2025; MPS 10-K (enterprise data segment).

tam_usd_bn.source: Ajinomoto IR — Functional Materials segment; ABF film ~95% share estimate (industry consensus, Prismark).
Murata IR (~40% share, component segment revenue), SEMCO IR, Taiyo Yuden IR, Yageo annual report; TrendForce/Paumanok MLCC market ~$11-13B.

eda_ip.note: Parent wrapper added 2026-07-04 — aggregates existing eda + ip entries (TAM 15.7 + 9.3 = 25.0).

equipment_subsections.note: In-page split 2026-07-04: Litho ~$28B (ASML FY25 ~€32B guide), Dep/Etch/Clean ~$55B (AMAT/LRCX/TEL FY25 revenue), Process Control ~$14B (KLA FY25 ~$11B + Lasertec/Onto/Camtek/Nova). Back-end (bonding/test) equipment intentionally excluded — covered under OSAT tab.

_sub_segments_2026_05_09b._note: Provenance for sub-segments added in second pass: Wafer→Si+SiC, Fabless→CPU/GPU/AI ASIC/Mobile SoC/Networking, OSAT→Packaging+Testing, Optical→Optical/PCB/Substrate/CCL/Fiber.

_qc_log_2026_05_09.summary: Restructured supply chain: HBM/DRAM/NAND/HDD wrapped under Memory parent; Optical moved between OSAT and Downstream; IDM replaced by Downstream parent with 5 end-market children (AI DC / Non-AI DC / PC / Smartphone / Auto+Industrial). Second pass: Wafer split into Si+SiC; Fabless split into CPU/GPU/AI ASIC/Mobile SoC/Networking; OSAT split into Packaging+Testing; Optical expanded to Optical/PCB/Substrate/CCL/Fiber. Third pass: TECH_DATA roadmap deep-dives added for all 13 new sub-segments, sourced from company earnings + investor materials.
_qc_log_2026_05_09.qc_method: Each new sub-segment TAM cross-checked against >=2 independent public sources (IDC, Yole Group, Lightcounting, Persistence Market Research, Mordor Intelligence, Statista, MarketsandMarkets, Prismark, SEMI, vendor 10-Ks). TECH_DATA roadmap entries cite earnings calls, investor presentations, and industry trade publications (Digitimes, TrendForce, Cignal AI, ECOC). Where sources disagreed >25%, the conservative midpoint was chosen and confidence marked 'low'/'medium'.
